title: Molten Wholesome Peruvian Baguette Empanada
description: A rich, post-workout Peruvian dish packed with the flavors of whole grain baguette, beurre-monte, and spices. A Whole30 friendly twist on a classic empanada recipe.

ingredients.name: beurre-monte
ingredients.notes: use a mixture of unsalted butter and egg yolk

instructions: Cut the day-old baguette into 1-inch slices and toast until lightly browned.
In a small bowl, mix together the beurre-monte, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and cayenne pepper (if using).
Place a toasted baguette slice on a flat surface and spread a tablespoon of the beurre-monte mixture on top.
Add a few pieces of diced chicken breast, followed by a spoonful of thawed peas.
Drizzle additional beurre-monte mixture on top and fold the baguette slice in half.
Repeat with the remaining ingredients to form 4-6 empanadas.
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the bread is crispy.
